document: 1. FSCA Conduct Standard 1 of 2025 - Requirements for FIs providing FE initiatives

sections.heading: Definitions
sections.summary: Defines key terms for financial education initiatives, including financial customer, financial education, and target groups.
sections.dtia_summary: Establishes terminology for financial education initiatives, critical for understanding cross-border data processing obligations.

requirements.text: Definitions of terms such as 'financial education initiative' and 'target group'.

sections.source_quote: "financial education initiative" means... (a) any financial education programme... (b) a consumer education programme..."

sections.heading: Application, purpose and proportional application
sections.summary: Specifies that the Conduct Standard applies to financial institutions providing financial education initiatives.
sections.dtia_summary: Outlines applicability of the standard, relevant for determining cross-border transfer obligations.

requirements.text: Conduct Standard applies to financial institutions providing financial education initiatives.

sections.source_quote: "This Conduct Standard is only applicable where a financial institution provides or offers a financial education initiative..."

sections.heading: Governance arrangements
sections.summary: Requires financial institutions to establish governance arrangements for financial education initiatives.
sections.dtia_summary: Mandates governance frameworks for financial education initiatives, impacting cross-border data management.

requirements.text: Financial institution must have governance arrangements to oversee financial education initiatives.

sections.source_quote: "A financial institution must have appropriate governance arrangements in place to oversee the design and implementation..."

sections.heading: Design and development requirements for financial education initiatives
sections.summary: Outlines design requirements for financial education initiatives, including content and delivery platforms.
sections.dtia_summary: Specifies content and delivery standards for financial education initiatives, relevant for data processing obligations.

requirements.text: Content of financial education initiatives must be based on objective information and targeted at the appropriate target group.

sections.source_quote: "The content of a financial education initiative... must be targeted suitably at the appropriate target group..."

sections.heading: Location and logistics
sections.summary: Restricts use of financial education initiatives for marketing and specifies reporting requirements.
sections.dtia_summary: Imposes restrictions on marketing financial education initiatives, affecting data sharing practices.

requirements.text: Financial institution may not use financial education initiatives for excessive marketing of specific brands or products.
Financial institution must report information on financial education initiatives to the Authority.

sections.source_quote: "A financial institution may not use a financial education initiative for the excessive marketing..."
